output.content: Fixed the stale cache race by checking the generation before returning a loaded entry. Added a deterministic concurrent invalidation regression. The focused race suite passed 100 consecutive runs and the full package suite is green.

name: cache-race.patch
text:
--- a/internal/cache/store.go
+++ b/internal/cache/store.go
@@ -88,6 +88,9 @@
+ current := generations[key]
+ if entry.Generation != current { return Value{}, false }
